message:
fix(mail,reservation-conflicts): fix NaN limit and negative wait time bugs

mail.ts:
- Fixed bug where parseInt could return NaN for invalid limit query param
- NaN would be passed through to API instead of being treated as undefined
- Now properly checks Number.isNaN() before using parsed value

reservation-conflicts.ts:
- Fixed potential negative wait time in conflict resolution suggestions
- Added check for msUntilExpiry > 0 to prevent suggesting negative wait
- Race condition could cause negative values if reservation expires
  between checking and creating the conflict message

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
